summary: Merged-payroll UI verification PASSED. The separate 'كشوفات الرواتب' tab is removed; only 10 tabs remain (الموظفين / تقرير الرواتب / الكشف اليومي / الحضور / السلف / الخصومات / المكافآت / الأوقات الإضافية / تقييم الموظفين / أجهزة البصمة). The top dashboard now exposes a 7th card 'الدفعات المصروفة' (data-testid=top-card-paid). Inside 'تقرير الرواتب' the report cards include 'الدفعات المصروفة' and 'المتبقي للموظفين' and the table has مدفوع نقداً / المتبقي columns with paid-/remaining- testids. The actions column correctly switches state per employee: when no payslip exists → calc-payroll-{employeeId} ('حساب الراتب'); after creating via the معاينة كشف الراتب dialog → status badge + pay-{employeeId} ('صرف') + print-payslip-{employeeId} ('طباعة الكشف'). End-to-end flow verified for موظف 1 (emp c2420786-…): clicked calc-payroll → preview dialog opened → 'إنشاء كشف الراتب' created the payslip → row showed مسودة badge + صرف + print → clicked صرف (window.confirm auto-accepted) → status badge flipped to 'تم الصرف' and the pay button disappeared (print stays). Header bulk-calc-payroll button is present, enabled, and after click it created the missing payslip for موظف 2 (calc-payroll button gone). The 'كشف حساب' (statement-from-summary-{id}) button is still rendered for every row. No JS console errors related to the merged UI; only pre-existing realtime-broker ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED noise (carry-over from iteration 220). Layout is one unified payroll page as requested.

ui_bugs.issue: Badge stays 'الوسيط غير متصل' and the console keeps logging ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED for the realtime websocket. REST endpoints work fine, no functional impact. Carry-over from prior iterations.
Branch combobox still renders the count badge concatenated as 'جميع الفروع1212'. Cosmetic only.

verified_features.Actions column 'حساب الراتب' calc-payrol: PASS (2 buttons rendered for موظف 1 + موظف 2)

action_items: (LOW/cosmetic) Investigate realtime-broker websocket — badge stays 'الوسيط غير متصل' and console is spammed with ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED.
(LOW/cosmetic) Fix branch selector label rendering 'جميع الفروع1212'.
critical_code_review_comments: payPayroll uses window.confirm() — fine functionally, but a shadcn AlertDialog would be more consistent with the rest of the app's UX (and easier for E2E tests). Same for bulkCalculatePayroll.

HR.js is now ~4438 lines. Strongly recommend splitting the large TabsContent blocks (salary-report, daily-payroll, attendance, advances, deductions, bonuses, overtime, ratings, biometric) into individual components under src/pages/hr/* to keep file <700 lines and improve maintainability.
seed_data_creation: Created two payslips for shahr 2026-06: موظف 1 (c2420786-...) created via the معاينة dialog and then paid via PUT /payroll/{id}/pay; موظف 2 (6b73794f-...) created via bulk-calc-payroll. Both can be cleaned up via DELETE /api/payroll/{id} if desired.
context_for_next_testing_agent: The merge is verified end-to-end. The 'salary-report' TabsContent is now the single payroll page and contains: top dashboard (incl. top-card-paid), report cards (incl. card-total-paid), report table (incl. paid-/remaining- columns and the merged actions: calc-payroll-{id} OR (pay-{id} + print-payslip-{id}) plus statement-from-summary-{id}), and the header bulk-calc-payroll button. Note: payPayroll() uses native window.confirm — Playwright tests must register page.on('dialog', d => d.accept()) before clicking pay-{id}, otherwise the click is a no-op.
